title: Lab 27: At Job Scheduling
description: Schedule a one time task with at and verify that the at daemon is enabled.

tasks.title: Create the user queue27 and set its password to
tasks.prompt: Create the user queue27 and set its password to cinder9.

tasks.title: Enable and start the atd service
tasks.prompt: Enable and start the atd service.

tasks.title: schedule a one-time at job that appends the text
tasks.prompt: As user queue27, schedule a one-time at job that appends the text AT27 OK to /home/queue27/at27.log two minutes from now.
solution_commands: runuser -l queue27 -c "echo 'echo AT27 OK >> /home/queue27/at27.log' | at now + 2 minutes"

hints: You can submit the job to at with standard input.
Use atq to verify that the job is queued.
